meta.title: Timurhan Kaya - Software Developer
meta.description: I build large-scale digital products, high-traffic systems, and long-lived platforms. I ship resilient architectures and end-to-end products in fintech, insurtech, and e-commerce.
meta.keywords: Timurhan Kaya, Backend Developer, Product Developer, Systems Architect, Laravel Developer, Vue.js Developer, PHP Developer, Istanbul Developer, Turkey, Wingie Enuygun, FinTech, Software Engineer

hero.name: Timurhan Kaya
hero.title: Software Developer at Wingie Enuygun Group
hero.description: Building products that carry millions of requests, move the business faster, and are ready to scale.

sidecard.now_body: Software Developer at Wingie Enuygun Group — building high-volume products and large-scale platforms.

about.title: About
about.p1: Over the last 5 years, I've built products that are not only functional, but able to grow. My focus is on large-scale projects, clear architecture, production stability, and measurable business impact.
about.p2: I primarily work with PHP/Laravel, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Elasticsearch. From high-volume platforms like Enuygun Sigorta to real-time fintech products like Monafy, I've taken end-to-end responsibility on multiple large projects.
about.p3: Outside of work, I keep building products. I created games like "Word Imposter" and "Vampire Village" for friends to use together, and I place them in my portfolio as a practical extension of product thinking, not just technical curiosity.

lines: final readonly class TimurhanKaya extends Developer implements ArchitectInterface

bullets: Building large-scale products and high-performance systems for millions of daily users
Architecting microservices and integrating complex APIs for next-gen insurance and fintech experiences
Designing solid comparison and reservation systems that users can rely on every day
Moving platforms forward on speed, scalability, and modern backend standards
Led the development of award-winning insurance platforms serving thousands of active users
Managed the lifecycle of production applications using Laravel, Vue.js, and RabbitMQ
Actively contributed to product development processes
Mentored junior developers and guided team-level technical decisions
Turned Figma designs and complex business needs into high-performance, responsive product experiences
Started in web development through real-world projects
Learned quickly from senior developers while contributing to live products
Built a strong base in clean code, best practices, and agile workflows

projects.title: Portfolio and Projects
projects.description: My work across enterprise platforms, product-led SaaS, and large-scale infrastructure. Not every project I touched is here, but I wrote them down so I won't forget them later.

items.name: Enuygun Sigorta
items.description: Insurance and comparison platform serving millions of users. Microservice architecture, real-time policy flow, and data optimization.
highlights: Managed project logs and live operational flows
Tracked bottlenecks and applied performance improvements
Contributed technical input on product and process decisions
Applied scalable, maintainable engineering standards

items.name: Tamamlayıcı Sağlık
items.description: End-to-end health insurance comparison and sales platform for Genç Sigorta. ERP, CRM, and insurance integrations in one product.
highlights: Designed the platform architecture and moved it to production
Built real-time pricing and policy purchase integrations with 20+ insurance companies
Mentored the team on pixel-perfect implementation and design handoff
Shipped ERP and CRM modules for internal operations teams

items.name: Monafy
items.description: AI-powered financial data analysis and stock market tracking platform. Real-time market data and KAP notification analysis.
highlights: Built real-time data flow with FMP and Yahoo Finance integrations
Developed a service that scrapes and summarizes KAP notifications
Implemented live notifications with Redis Pub/Sub and WebSockets
Shipped a highly available stack with Laravel 12, Docker, and a hybrid data layer

items.name: eDanışman
items.description: Rebuilding a SaaS product for Sistem Global that digitizes consulting workflows with a modern, scalable architecture.
highlights: Built a SaaS architecture for digitizing consulting services
Developed fast appointment and financial flow management
Integrated an SSR-backed Nuxt.js frontend
Created a modular service architecture*

items.name: Kommunity
items.description: Events, content, and community management platform used across 85+ countries.
highlights: Managed technical operations for tech communities and conferences
Coordinated speaker screens, streaming infrastructure, and technical needs
Provided CMS and admin panel support through Laravel Nova

items.name: Marpo
items.description: AI-based news and content platform with a personalized feed.
highlights: Built the backend infrastructure for the recommendation engine
Reduced feed latency with a Redis caching strategy
Set up an SSR-capable Nuxt.js frontend
Integrated news scrapers into an asynchronous queue architecture

items.name: Transiyzi
items.description: AI-powered localization management platform for software, apps, and games. A professional SaaS solution featuring GPT-3 and DeepL integration, CLI/API support, and seamless CI/CD integration.
highlights: Developed the entire platform independently from scratch, covering both architecture and implementation
AI-powered machine translation infrastructure integrated with GPT-3, DeepL, Google, and Microsoft
Advanced import/export and management features for a wide range of file formats (.xml, .json, .xls, etc.)
Full compatibility with modern CI/CD workflows through CLI and REST API support

items.name: Moneo Render
items.description: Dynamic rendering solution for JavaScript apps. Achieve higher SEO rankings and social media previews without breaking UX.
highlights: Participated in developing the entire rendering engine and SaaS infrastructure independently from scratch.

items.name: AbilityPool
items.description: Corporate social responsibility and volunteering platform. Digital ecosystem that brings together the skills of company employees with non-governmental organizations.
highlights: Created the pixel-perfect design from Figma
Contributed to Symfony development and core logic

items.name: GetContact eSIM
items.description: eSIM purchase and management platform for the GetContact app. Figma-accurate implementation.
highlights: Created the pixel-perfect design from Figma
Developed the frontend business logic collaborated with the Teknasyon team

items.name: Palex ITS
items.description: Pallet delivery and operation tracking application. Real-time logistics management for field teams.
highlights: Helped build the pallet delivery and operations tracking system end-to-end
Assisted in designing the real-time logistics dashboard for field teams

items.name: Akrep
items.description: E-commerce price comparison platform. Real-time price tracking and product listings across hundreds of stores.
highlights: My first software project (where I learned Laravel)
Helped build the data scraping pipeline and price comparison engine

items.name: Guille Marketplace
items.description: Fast, easy order management and seller onboarding portal for restaurants and vendors. pixel-perfect.
highlights: Helped build the full seller onboarding portal from scratch, covering the entire application and approval flow
Modelled order management workflows and state transitions on the backend
Implemented Figma designs pixel-perfectly using Tailwind CSS and delivered a responsive UI
Added a real-time order tracking feature to streamline restaurant operations

items.name: Moneo Aircraft
items.description: An aircraft comparison and selection platform for the private aviation sector, based on technical data and budget criteria.
highlights: Developed a dynamic filtering and matching engine based on range, age, budget, and passenger capacity
Delivered a specialized dashboard interface for visual analysis and technical comparison of aviation data
Architected a high-precision, interactive dark-mode user experience for complex datasets

items.name: Herbalfit Ecosystem
items.description: Multiple independent e-commerce stores (Hayat, Sepet, Değişim) for specialised product sales.
highlights: Helped build three independent e-commerce stores (Hayat, Sepet, Değişim) on a shared infrastructure
Implemented product, category, and order management systems
Delivered responsive mobile-first designs using Bootstrap

items.name: Cashflow NFT & Phoenic Node
items.description: NFT sales and management platforms with Web3 wallet integration and smart contract-based sale flows.
highlights: Integrated Web3 wallet connection and NFT sale flows
Helped build smart contract-based ownership verification on the backend
Developed Referral and Star management systems

items.name: Eagle Global Plastik
items.description: Corporate landing page for a plastic packaging company.
highlights: Helped build the corporate landing page for a plastic packaging company
Implemented the design pixel-perfectly from Figma

items.name: Sera Ambalaj
items.description: Corporate landing page for a leading box, label and packaging manufacturer. AI-assisted fast delivery.
highlights: Rapid 2-3 hour corporate project developed using AI for friends.

items.name: Moneo & Vispera
items.description: Corporate websites for Vispera (visual AI for retail) and Moneo (software development company).
highlights: Helped build corporate websites for Vispera (visual AI for retail) and Moneo (software company)
Implemented Figma designs pixel-perfectly with Tailwind CSS

items.name: Tech Conferences
items.description: PHP Konf, SaaS Istanbul AI, Hepsiburada JS Konf event pages — pixel-perfect design.
highlights: Delivered pixel-perfect event sites for PHP Konf, SaaS Istanbul AI, and Hepsiburada JS Konf
Helped build a reusable template architecture covering speaker management, schedules, and registration
Shipped high-quality frontend for each conference on tight deadlines

items.name: Rise Online Fan
items.description: Fan and community page dedicated to the Rise Online game.
highlights: Assisted in designing and built a community fan page for Rise Online players
Helped build backend API infrastructure for player stats and dynamic content feeds

items.name: Yeniyıl Arkadaşım
items.description: A user-friendly platform developed for New Year's gift exchanges and organization.
highlights: Implemented the pixel-perfect design directly from Figma
Contributed to the development of the draw algorithm and user matching system

items.name: Triwizard Tournament
items.description: An interactive online tournament experience inspired by the Harry Potter universe.
highlights: Delivered pixel-perfect designs for campaign and gamification mechanics
Interactive user experience supported by side projects like Endless Fame

items.name: Word Imposter
items.description: A high-social interaction word guessing and spy finding game developed for friend groups. A modern and fun gaming experience.
highlights: Built real-time multiplayer game mechanics from scratch using Laravel Livewire
Lobby settings: Host can kick players and add password protection to the lobby
Maximum 6 player limit can be set, with round logic managed via a state machine
Integrated into the personal portfolio site to showcase technical skills through an interactive experience

items.name: Vietnamees Foodies
items.description: Vietnamese food franchise mobile application.
highlights: Took over the project from another team and made it functional
Participated in developing Sapaad and Loyalty system integrations

items.title: Insurance Industry Awards
items.body: Won industry awards for innovative insurance platforms (product + engineering).

items.title: Team Leadership & Mentorship
items.body: Led teams and mentored developers — shipping sustainably, without burnout.

items.title: High-Performance Delivery
items.body: Responsive UI integration, data optimization, and frontend speed criteria.

contact.title: Send a Direct Email.
contact.description: Let's skip the contact forms. If you need a new module, a large-scale product, or a platform to sustain, send the scope, goals, and technical constraints directly, and I'll get back to you with a clear development plan.
